protocol: All known alpha sleeves combined with wave-feature train-only hard gates and portfolio BLOCK_RISK selector. Splits: train<2024, test=2024, eval=2025, ytd2026 through local data. Fees+slippage 5bp/side via existing event simulation; strict in-position MDD. Selector/gate thresholds fit on train only; selection ranking is diagnostic and uses test/eval/ytd report columns, not promoted live config.
